headline: Intel, Advanced Micro, And Texas Instruments Are Among Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (April 20-April 24): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: Large-cap stocks surged last week, driven by semiconductor strength and earnings-fueled optimism across sectors.
